summary: BFM-Zero's near-ground advantage is the co-designed policy + controller gains, not either alone.

holo_bfm_gains.note: still fails with BFM-Zero's stiff gains

conclusion: Gains are NECESSARY for BFM-Zero (collapses on soft gains) but NOT SUFFICIENT for HoloMotion (still fails on stiff gains). It is the policy+controller package, co-designed; neither factor alone explains the gap.
